meta.name: council-verdict-schema
meta.description: Zod-compatible output schema for Council v2 verdicts. Use this to validate LLM output.

verdict.description: The decision. GO = do it. PIVOT = change something. DONT = stop.

idea_summary.description: One-line restatement of the idea in Council's own words. Proves we understood.

text.description: The reason itself. 1-2 sentences max. Plain language.

type.description: What kind of evidence backs this reason

source.description: Where this evidence comes from. URL, platform name, or 'assumption' if guessing.

detail.description: Supporting detail for drill-down. Can be longer.

score.description: How confident Council is in this verdict

missing_data.description: What data would increase confidence. Required if score < 60.

pivot_suggestion.description: Required when verdict is PIVOT. Optional for DONT.

financials.description: Optional. Included when finance_calc tool was used.

tone_check.description: Self-check. LLM validates its own tone before responding.

card_subtitle.description: One-line verdict summary for social sharing
